text:
(a) A hearing requested under Section 521.298 (Hearing Request) shall be held not earlier than the 11th day after the date on which the person requesting the hearing is notified of the hearing. The hearing shall be set for the earliest practical date.

(b) A hearing may be continued on a motion of the person, the department, both parties, or as necessary to accommodate the docket of the presiding officer.

(c) A request for a hearing stays suspension or revocation of a person’s license until the date of the final decision of the presiding officer.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.299 — Hearing Date; Rescheduling

(a) A hearing requested under Section 521.298 (Hearing Request) shall be held not earlier than the 11th day after the date on which the person requesting the hearing is notified of the hearing. The hearing shall be set for the earliest practical date.

(b) A hearing may be continued on a motion of the person, the department, both parties, or as necessary to accommodate the docket of the presiding officer.

(c) A request for a hearing stays suspension or revocation of a person’s license until the date of the final decision of the presiding officer.

*Added by Acts 1999, 76th Leg., ch. 1117, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 2000.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A hearing requested under Section 521.298 (Hearing Request) shall be held not earlier than the 11th day after the date on which the person requesting the hearing is notified of the hearing. The hearing shall be set for the earliest practical date.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A hearing may be continued on a motion of the person, the department, both parties, or as necessary to accommodate the docket of the presiding officer.

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: A request for a hearing stays suspension or revocation of a person’s license until the date of the final decision of the presiding officer.

history.raw: Added by Acts 1999, 76th Leg., ch. 1117, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 2000.
